services_supported: sprinkler leaks or fire alarms going off
non_emergency_routing_rules: Take a message and confirm follow-up during business hours
call_transfer_rules: Fallback: Client: Apologize and say dispatch will call back in 5 mins
integration_constraints: Never create sprinkler jobs in ServiceTrade
after_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller > Confirm purpose > If emergency: collect name/number/address > Attempt transfer > Fallback if fails > If non-emergency: take message > Close
office_hours_flow_summary: Greet > Ask purpose > Collect name/number > Transfer/Route > Fallback if fails > Confirm next steps > Anything else? > Close
questions_or_unknowns: emergency_definition: Emergency types not defined – confirm during onboarding
notes: v2 – Confirmed onboarding. 4 field(s) updated. 1 unknown(s) remain.
